campaign.title: Monsoon Learning Support Drive
campaign.goal: Support students who missed classes during monsoon disruptions

updates.update_text: 18 students attended the weekend learning support session at the community center. Volunteers helped with reading practice and basic mathematics revision.
Three volunteers distributed worksheets and noted that several students still need extra support in basic multiplication and reading fluency.
Parents requested one more follow-up session next Saturday because some students could not attend due to heavy rain.
